title: Customize Your computer
drDigitalIntro:
Make your computer work the way you want.
• Change the display theme and the wallpaper.
• Adjust trackpad sensitivity and notification settings.
• Check your storage. This is how you make your computer your own.
drDigitalSuccess: Your computer is customized just the way you like it!
drDigitalHint: Start with Appearance, then try hardware and notification settings.
